indication: ERBITUX is an epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR) antagonist indicated for treatment of in combination with encorafenib, for the treatment of adult patients with metastatic colorectal cancer (CRC) with a BRAF V600E mutation, as detected by an FDA-approved test, after prior therapy.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to cetuximab in combination with encorafenib for the treatment of adult patients with metastatic colorectal cancer with a BRAF V600E mutation, as detected by an FDA-approved test, after prior therapy.

document.name: Erbitux (cetuximab) [package insert]. FDA.
